reference: Doctor, my child is twenty months old. She has been experiencing vomiting and fever for the last two days. Her urine frequency has decreased and it turns white after a few minutes. Diarrhea is not very frequent but she discharges white loose stools. What should I do for her relief?
text: Doctor, my child is twenty months old. She has been experiencing vomiting and fever for the last two days. Her urine frequency has decreased, and it turns white after a few minutes. Diarrhea is not very frequent, but she discharges white loose stools. What should I do for her relief?
